# Arts & Culture

Literature, film, music, and cultural events from the year 2007.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->

| Topic | Summary |
|---|---|
| [Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows](harry-potter-deathly-hallows.md) | J. K. Rowling's seventh and final Harry Potter novel was published July 21, selling 8.3 million copies in 24 hours in the U.S. alone — a Guinness World Record — and concluding a decade-long publishing phenomenon. |
| [Writers Guild of America Strike](writers-guild-strike.md) | Approximately 12,000 WGA members struck from November 5, 2007 through February 12, 2008 over digital distribution residuals, halting U.S. television production for 100 days and reshaping residual-pay rules. |
